item.title: Japanese stocks rise on Takaichi’s snap election landslide
item.description: Japan’s new prime minister Sanae Takaichi has won a landslide victory in a snap election, prompting optimism that her pro-growth agenda will benefit J...

item.title: Alphabet 'is planning a 100-year bond': would you back Google for 100 years?
item.description: Google owner Alphabet is reported to be joining the rare century bond club

item.title: Pension Credit: should the mixed-age couples rule be scrapped?
item.description: The mixed-age couples rule was introduced in May 2019 to reserve pension credit for older households but a charity warns it is unfair

item.title: Average income tax by area: The parts of the UK paying the most tax mapped
item.description: The UK’s total income tax bill was £240.7 billion 2022/23, but the tax burden is not spread equally around the country. We look at the towns and borou...

item.title: BBC TV licence fee hike confirmed: can you reduce how much you pay?
item.description: The cost of a TV licence fee is set to rise by over 3%, but there are ways to reduce the bill.
